name: Vedant Dubal
title: Systems & DevOps Enthusiast | Linux Tinkerer

current_role.position: I've been tinkering with systems for years, moving from simple scripting to complex DevOps automation and kernel-level experimentation.
current_role.education: I'm a computer science student who spends an unreasonable amount of time breaking operating systems and then fixing them.

Systems.name: Linux
Systems.desc: Arch Linux (btw), system configuration, kernel tinkering

featured_projects.name: Android Rooting: Proot vs Chroot
featured_projects.description: A comprehensive guide on rooting Android devices and the architectural differences between Proot and Chroot. Explores kernel-level solutions like Magisk and KernelSU for high-performance Linux userspaces in Termux.

featured_projects.name: DockForge
featured_projects.description: An automation engine for Docker environments. Automatically detects system compatibility, installs Docker if missing, and orchestrates container deployments with zero manual configuration.

featured_projects.name: AI Voice Cloning (RVC)
featured_projects.description: [UPCOMING] A deep dive into training AI voice models. Covers environment setup with CUDA, PyTorch, and FFmpeg for high-fidelity real-time voice cloning and dataset preparation.

featured_projects.name: Central Hostel React Clone
featured_projects.description: A complete frontend clone of the Central Hostel website built natively with React. Showcases complex CSS layouts, interactive booking features, and responsive grid systems.

featured_projects.name: Loopring React Clone
featured_projects.description: An aesthetic frontend landing page mimicking Loopring's ecosystem. Features intricate CSS animations, responsive navbar, and Web3 product marketing style segments.

featured_projects.name: H&M UI Clone
featured_projects.description: A robust eCommerce storefront replica for H&M using React. Focuses on product gallery manipulation, hover states, filtering UI interfaces, and heavy layout architectures.

achievements: Authored Guide on Android Rooting (Proot vs Chroot)
interests: DevOps automation and infrastructure as code
